webinar.topic: Excel Career Masterclass - By Excel Bhaiya Abhishek

methodology.webinarLengthRule: Attendance calculations use fixed 7:00 PM IST through webinar end.
methodology.courseRevealRule: Course reveal time was detected from the first admin chat message containing course/price/link details.
methodology.stayedTillEndRule: Stayed till end means the final drop time was within 5 minutes of webinar end.
